entities.name: DIALLEL MATING DESIGNS
entities.description: Mating designs used to determine the inheritance of quantitative traits of interest to plant breeders

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits of interest to plant breeders whose inheritance is determined using diallel mating designs

entities.name: AMMI MODEL
entities.description: Additive main effects and multiplicative interaction model used to analyze the two-way factorial data structure of diallel designs

entities.name: GRIFFING'S METHOD 1 MODEL I
entities.description: A specific method for diallel analysis applied jointly with the AMMI model to analyze breeding values

entities.name: BREEDING VALUE
entities.description: The genetic value of inbred lines determined through the joint application of AMMI and Griffing's method

entities.name: INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines in a self-pollinated crop used in diallel crosses to determine breeding value

entities.name: BREAD WHEAT
entities.description: A disomic, hexaploid self-pollinated crop used as the subject of the diallel cross analysis

entities.name: MULTIENVIRONMENT TRIAL
entities.description: A trial conducted across multiple environments to provide data for the analysis of diallel crosses

entities.name: EAST AFRICAN HIGHLANDS
entities.description: The geographical region where the bread wheat lines were adapted

entities.name: F1 HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superior performance of offspring relative to parents, identified through the combined analysis approach
